title: 7 of the most luxurious mooncakes for mid autumn 2025
full_text: Main Eat Drink Reviews Insider At Home About Us Download Our Magazine Q2 2026 Q1 2026 Vol 1 Palate Dining Guide 2025-2026 Main Eat Drink Reviews Insider At Home About Us Download Our Magazine Q2 2026 Q1 2026 Vol 1 Palate Dining Guide 2025-2026 Now Reading: 7 Of The Most Luxurious Mooncakes For Mid-Autumn 2025 1 01 7 Of The Most Luxurious Mooncakes For Mid-Autumn 2025 Main// Eat// Drink// Reviews// Insider// At Home// About Us// Download Our Magazine// Q2 2026// Q1 2026// Vol 1 Palate Dining Guide 2025-2026// Home Eat 7 Of The Most Luxurious Mooncakes For Mid-Autumn 20257 Of The Most Luxurious Mooncakes For Mid-Autumn 2025Patrick LohEat, At Home9 months agoShare This Mid-Autumn Festival, mooncakes step beyond tradition into the realm of couture, where flavour, artistry, and design come together in the most exquisite collections of the year. Mooncakes have always been more than just festive pastries. They are heirlooms of culture, exchanged as gifts of love, unity, and good fortune under the glow of the full moon. But in 2025, these seasonal treasures are being reimagined with an elevated flair, turning age-old tradition into modern indulgence. Think couture-like packaging that rivals fashion accessories, daring flavours that surprise the palate, and keepsake boxes that live on long after the last bite is savoured. From EQ Kuala Lumpur’s handbag-inspired cases to Mandarin Oriental’s avant-garde chocolate blends, this year’s mooncakes blur the line between gastronomy and art. Each collection tells its own story—of heritage, craftsmanship, and a little extravagance—making the act of gifting as memorable as the mooncakes themselves. Whether you’re a traditionalist drawn to lotus paste and double yolks, or an adventurer chasing red velvet avocado and popping candy surprises, these seven luxurious offerings promise to sweeten your Mid-Autumn celebration in style. EQ Kuala Lumpur This year’s Celestial Treasures collection transforms Mid-Autumn gifting into an art form, presenting boxes that could easily pass for chic handbags or elegant hatboxes. Inside, the choice is yours: the four-piece Autumn Jade baked classics or the six-piece Autumn Jade snow skin selection, each one crafted with as much attention to aesthetics as to flavour. For those with a taste for indulgence, the Premium collection is pure extravagance. Imagine baked mooncakes paired with either Hennessy VSOP or Bottega Gold Prosecco, all nestled within a cinnamon-hued case that doubles as a sleek drink carrier—a gift that dazzles long after the last mooncake is gone. And if you’re after something playful yet refined, the Miniature collection offers eight petite mooncakes in one charming box, a bite-sized way to share the season’s joy. These exclusives await only at the EQ Lobby Mooncake Pop-Up Booth, where luxury and tradition meet under the glow of the Mid-Autumn moon. Tel: 03-2789 7777 IOI Resort City Moonique by IOI Festive At IOI Resort City, the Mid-Autumn celebration takes on a uniquely Malaysian soul with Moonique by IOI Festive—a collection where heritage and artistry intertwine. This year’s theme, “where elegance meets heritage,” draws inspiration from Peranakan culture, weaving timeless motifs into designs that feel both nostalgic and refreshingly modern. Fronting the campaign is Miss Universe Malaysia 2024, Sandra Lim, adorned in the graceful Nyonya kebaya—a symbol of cultural pride reimagined for today. The mooncakes themselves are handcrafted by the culinary artisans of Le Mei, presented in two exquisite sets: the Three Heirlooms Set and the Seri Nyonya Six Set, the latter paired with a charming mini Nyonya plate. Flavours nod to local favourites while adding a touch of indulgence—think pandan, durian, rose, Chinese tea, fruit and nut, and classic lotus paste with or without golden yolk. It’s a collection that doesn’t just satisfy the palate but also tells a story of heritage, refinement, and celebration. Find these treasures across Putrajaya Marriott Hotel, Le Méridien Putrajaya, Four Points by Sheraton Puchong, and Moxy Putrajaya. Tel: (603) 8947 8888 Overseas mooncake Overseas Classic Baked Mooncakes Celebrating 45 years of craftsmanship, Oversea Group marks this Mid-Autumn Festival with a collection that blossoms with meaning. Inspired by petals unfurling in layers, the packaging symbolises generations gathering under one roof—an ethos that has shaped Oversea’s legacy since the 1980s. True to its spirit, this year’s design blends timeless tradition with a modern flourish, turning each box into a keepsake as striking as the mooncakes nestled within. Inside, the line-up is as thoughtful as it is indulgent. Beloved staples like Lotus, Golden Emerald, and Shanghai sit alongside contemporary creations from the Momoyama Baked Series—think molten Chocolate Lava, delicate Matcha Red Bean Mochi, and nutty Yam Sesame. For a touch of whimsy, there’s even the Snowy Popping Mooncake, laced with white chocolate and popping candy for a playful surprise in every bite. For those who crave the best of both worlds, the Premium Set curates a refined mix of heritage flavours and modern delights, making it a gift of balance, beauty, and flavour. Tel: 010-303 2200 Oriental Group This Mid-Autumn Festival, Oriental Group invites families to gather under the glow of the full moon with its 2025 Mooncake Collection—a symphony of tradition and innovation woven into every bite. True to its reputation for culinary refinement, this year’s theme, “A Lunar Reunion of Love and Tradition,” beautifully encapsulates the heart of the season: togetherness, nostalgia, and the joy of sharing. The collection offers something for everyone, from those who find comfort in time-honoured classics to adventurous gourmands eager to explore modern snow skin creations. Each mooncake is a testament to craftsmanship—handcrafted with premium ingredients, refined techniques, and a touch of artistry that elevates the familiar into the extraordinary. Oriental Group’s dedication to balancing heritage with contemporary tastes ensures that every gift box carries more than flavour; it carries a story of connection, thoughtfully designed to spark joy around the table. Tel: 03-7956 9288 Mandarin Oriental, Kuala Lumpur Mandarin Oriental Kuala Lumpur has long been synonymous with elegance, and its mooncakes are no exception. Year after year, the hotel raises the bar for Mid-Autumn indulgence, and in 2025, the collection takes on an even bolder edge. This season, expect not only the refinement Mandarin Oriental is known for, but also a spirit of adventure woven into every bite. For those with curious palates, the line-up introduces unexpected flavour pairings that surprise and delight. Take the Dubai Chocolate, for instance—a decadent combination of pistachios and crisp kataifi pastry layered into smooth milk chocolate—or the Red Velvet Avocado, which marries the richness of cocoa with the buttery creaminess of avocado in a way that feels both daring and luxurious. These contemporary creations sit comfortably alongside the hotel’s beloved classics, including Lotus Paste with Single Yolk and the ever-popular snow skin Musang King Durian, ensuring there’s something for both the traditionalist and the trendsetter. The artistry extends beyond flavour to presentation, where Mandarin Oriental once again proves that less can be more. The mooncakes are encased in sleek, minimalist gift boxes available in sets of two, four, or six—designs that embody sophistication with an understated flair. For larger orders, the hotel also offers bespoke customisation services, allowing corporate clients and discerning gifters to add a meaningful, personal touch. The result is a collection that feels as much about style and storytelling as it does about taste—a perfect union of culinary craftsmanship and timeless luxury that makes every gift a statement. Tel: 03-2380 8888 Shangri-La Kuala Lumpur At Shangri-La Kuala Lumpur, mooncakes are not just festive treats—they are symbols of prosperity, beauty, and refinement. This year’s collection draws inspiration from the peony, a flower revered for centuries as a symbol of harmony, honour, and grace. Much like the bloom itself, each gift set is designed to impress, turning the ritual of gifting into an art form. With boxes as exquisite as the treasures they hold, every detail feels intentional—crafted not only to cradle the confections within but also to live on as an elegant keepsake, a reminder of Mid-Autumn moments shared. The 2025 collection casts a wide net, appealing to both traditionalists and adventurous palates. Classics such as Red Bean with Aged Tangerine Peel and White Lotus with Double Yolk offer the comfort of heritage, while snow skin creations like Toffee Butterscotch and Musang King Durian add a playful, modern twist. At the heart of it all are signature gift sets like the eight-piece Celestial Treasure and the limited 40th Anniversary Decade of Harmony collection—each promising not just flavour but a memorable unboxing experience. Whether for family, friends, or business partners, Shangri-La’s mooncakes ensure there’s a perfect gesture for every kind of celebration. Tel: 03-2032 2388 Four Points by Sheraton Kuala Lumpur City Centre If nostalgia could be savoured, it would taste a lot like Four Points by Sheraton’s Moonlit Memento 2.0 collection. This year’s lineup leans into retro romance, with mooncakes tucked into vintage-inspired tin boxes that echo old-school charm. The design, adorned with Biàn Liàn masks from the famed Sichuan opera, also pays homage to the hotel’s signature restaurant, Sichuan Kitchen. More than just packaging, these tins are built to last—making for charming storage keepsakes long after the festival lights dim. But the beauty isn’t only skin-deep. Inside, the mooncakes spotlight wellness-driven baking, made with reduced sugar and certified halal to suit a wide range of diets. Familiar favourites like White Lotus Single Yolk and Red Bean sit alongside a new addition: the Matcha Omochi, which blends a Japanese-inspired touch with traditional form. For 2025, Four Points offers a collection that balances flavour and function—perfect for those who crave a little tradition wrapped in modern practicality for their Mid-Autumn ritual.
